title: Sheared Cows
description: This mod adds the possiblity to shear cows just like sheeps! Now for Forge!
body:
### 🐮 Sheared Cows
---
Ever wanted to shear a cow just like a sheep? Well, now you can!
This mod adds the ability to shear cows and collect their leather!

A config to this mod will come soon!

### 📈 **Supported Versions**
---
- 1.19.2 - **SUPPORTED**
- 1.19.3 - Not supported
- 1.19.4 - **SUPPORTED**
- 1.20 - Not supported
- 1.20.1 - **SUPPORTED**

This is a Forge port of the original mod “Shear Cows".
